SEARCH
Package wzlib.util

Class WzXmlDeserializer

java.lang.Object
wzlib.util.WzXmlDeserializer
public final class WzXmlDeserializer extends Object
從 XML 格式匯入 WZ 物件。 Imports WZ objects from XML format.

Ported from: MapleLib/WzLib/Serializer/WzXmlDeserializer.cs
